STATS DISPOSITION
Off Calendar Feb-04-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to cross-defendants Chau Yu, Kwok Kwong, Kwok Fong, Felicia Chen Kwong, Rita Kwong, Maney F. Kwong, Jeffrey Kwong, Jacky Kwong and All Persons, Unknown, Claiming any Legal or Equitable Right, Title, Estate, Lien or Interest in the Real Property located at 872, 874 and 876 Sacramento Street/800, 802, 804 and 810 Stockton Street, San Francisco, CA.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Leonard P. Mastromonaco, Esq. appeared for cross-complainant Dynasty Properties LLC, a Delaware limited liability company.
Tiger Wong, Managing Member of Dynasty Properties LLC, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by cross-defendants.
Plaintiff's First Amended Cross-Complaint to Quiet Title and for Declaratory Relief was filed on January16, 2018 and personally served on cross-defendant Kwok Kwong on June 27, 2018.
Substitute service on cross-defendants Chau Yu, Kwok Kwong, Kwok Fong, Felicia Chen Kwong, Rita Kwong, Maney F. Kwong, Jeffrey Kwong and Jacky Kwong occurred on June 27, 2018, and was effectuated on July 7, 2018.
Default as to cross-defendant Kwok Kwong was entered on July 7, 2018.
Default as to cross-defendant Chau Yu was entered on October 30, 2018.
Default as to cross-defendants Kwok Fong, Felicia Chen Kwong, Rita Kwong, Maney F. Kwong, Jeffrey Kwong and Jacky Kwong was entered on November 6, 2018.
Order vacating the defaults of cross-defendants Felicia Kwong and Jacky Kwong was filed on February 14, 2019.
Cross-defendants Felicia Kwong and Jakcy Kwong filed their respective answers to plaintiff's first amended cross-complaint on February 15, 2029.
Stipulation for Entry of Judgment in favor of cross-complainant Dynasty Properties LLC against cross-defendants Felicia Kwong and Jacky Kwong was filed on September 13, 2019.
ROE cross-defendants were dismissed on November 6, 2019.

Cross-defendant Dynasty Properties LLC submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Two page Grant Deed filed with the SF Recorder's Office....................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Property assessment of 874 Sacramento Street, San Francisco, CA............ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Cross-complainant Dynasty Properties LLC, and against the Defaulted Cross-Defendants Chau Yu, Kwok Kwong, Kwok Fong, Felicia Chen Kwong, Rita Kwong, Maney F. Kwong, Jeffrey Kowng, Jacky Kwong and All Persons, Unknown, Claiming any Legal or Equitable Right, Title, Estate, Lien or Interest in the Real Property located at 872, 874 and 876 Sacramento Street/800, 802, 804 and 810 Stockton Street, San Francisco, CA, as follows:

Attorney Fees - $71,713.00.

Total - $71,713.00.

Additionally, cross-complaint Dynasty Properties LLC is adjudged sole owner in fee simple title to the real property located at 872, 874 and 876 Sacramento Street/800, 802, 804 and 810 Stockton Street, San Francisco, CA, and as of December 29, 2004, cross-complaint Dynasty Properties LLC is adjudged sole owner in fee simple title to the real property the date that cross-complainant recorded the Grant Deed with the San Francisco Recorder's Office.

Lastly, cross-complainant Dynasty Properties LLC have judgment against cross-defendant Chau Yu in the amount of $2,750.00, and against cross-defendant Kwok Kwong in the amount of $2,750.00, pursuant to the Court's Order on cross-complainant's motion to compel the depositions of Chau Yu and Kwok Kwong, issued April 5, 2018.

Counsel for cross-defendant shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.
